title: What are AI agents?
summary: Google released the Agent Development Kit (ADK), a framework for building autonomous multi-agent systems. The video demonstrates building a self-correcting blog-writing agent using ADK, covering the ReAct Framework, three agent patterns (sequential, reactive, planning), and practical implementation with validation and error-correction loops.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video introduces the Agent Development Kit (ADK), a framework for building autonomous multi-agent systems, and walks through constructing a self-correcting blog-writing agent. It covers the ReAct Framework and three agent patterns: sequential, reactive, and planning. The implementation includes validation checkers and error-correction loops, showing how an agent loop revises its own output rather than producing a single pass.
